name: doge-trading-bot-demo
description: Premium AI-powered DOGE/USDT trading bot with real-time dark glassmorphism dashboard.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
